Microsoft Partners can help accelerate your digital transformation and find the right cloud solution for your organization.

USS Midway Museum

Discover how USS Midway Museum is charting a course for success, breaking down data silos, and amplifying their mission with Microsoft Cloud for Nonprofit and SylogistMission CRM.

Azure Business Applications Microsoft Cloud for Nonprofit Modern Work

Azure partners

Microsoft Azure is a set of cloud services to help your organization accelerate your mission. It’s the freedom to build, manage, and deploy applications on a massive, global network using your favorite tools and frameworks. It helps you reduce costs, manage infrastructure constraints, enhance your organization’s security, and scale up or down based on your needs. Confidently migrate your workloads to Azure with these select partners who are ready to deliver infrastructure and migration solutions to help make your nonprofit more efficient and innovative.

Business Applications

Microsoft Business Applications help nonprofits unlock new opportunities to drive digital transformation by breaking down data silos to connect beneficiaries, employees, donors, and volunteers with products, solutions, and operations.

Are you a Business Applications Partner?

If you’re a Microsoft Partner looking to develop Business Applications solutions for Nonprofits, we’d love to hear from you!
Join the Partners for Social Impact Community

Microsoft Cloud for Nonprofit partners

Microsoft Cloud for Nonprofit aligns the capabilities of Microsoft 365, Power Platform, Dynamics 365, Azure, and LinkedIn into one trusted platform to address common nonprofit scenarios—all based on a Common Data Model to unite disparate data sources and unlock the power of your data. Our partners make it their goal to help accelerate your mission. These select partners are ready to help you get started with Microsoft Cloud for Nonprofit.
Explore nonprofit apps Discover Implementation offers

Microsoft 365 partners

Microsoft 365 lays the foundation your team members need to excel in their roles and to engage with constituents, donors, and volunteers. Microsoft 365 is an integrated solution that brings together Office applications, intelligent cloud services, and world-class security to help you run and grow your nonprofit organization. These select partners are ready to deliver powerful productivity and collaboration tools to help make your nonprofit more efficient and innovative.

See our partners in action

Nonprofit Partner of the Year Award Winner 2024: Valorem Reply

Learn more about Valorem Reply

RedBit & Second Harvest

We connect food donors with charities to bring food to those in need. With the COVID-19 pandemic, a surge in demand required immediate optimization of our technology platform.
Read the Second Harvest story

Blueprint + NY Foundling

Discover how Blueprint helped unlock the power of Azure to streamline records and reduce reporting time from months to a matter of minutes.
Play the video
SpliceNet TechSoup ProServeIT

"All of us are living in the cause, not just the matter at hand, not just the technology."

Jim Gast, SpliceNet

"The multiplication effect, the compounding effect of helping a nonprofit, is incredibly rewarding."

Shruti Ramaswarmi, TechSoup

"It’s all about thinking “how do you help nonprofits have a bigger impact?"

Eric Sugar, ProServeIT
Back to tabs

Microsoft partner resources

We’re here to help you drive societal impact in the nonprofit sector and create real-world change. The resources below will help you grow your cloud practice and expand your customer reach.

Become a Microsoft Partner for Social Impact

The Partners for Social Impact Community helps you expand your cloud practice and deliver solutions that will drive both business growth and social impact.
Join the Partners for Social Impact Community

Go to market with confidence

Explore ready-to-go resources and programs to help you generate leads, build your nonprofit practice, and accelerate your time to market.
Get nonprofit marketing campaigns Automate your digital marketing (MPN ID required)

Everything you need in one place

Access the Nonprofit partner digital experience to explore sector-specific cloud resources, customer stories, and the latest industry news. We also have custom journey paths depending on your business strategy to help you best serve the nonprofit sector.
Get started today

Build partnerships

Reach new customers and build a stronger business with more successful partnerships.
Connect with a partner today
